message:
test(core): replay capture forensic logging + tantivy reindex LabRuntime port

replay_capture_integration.rs (+245 lines):
- CaptureMetrics struct tracking capture_events, decisions_captured,
  secrets_detected/redacted, compression_ratio, roundtrip_match
- CaptureLogGuard with structured forensic logging (scenario_id,
  decision_path, correlation_id, artifact_path, metrics)
- Enhanced test coverage for capture → read → validate roundtrip with
  metrics collection and structured evidence output

tantivy_reindex_labruntime.rs (new, 2278 lines):
- Ports all 45 tokio::test functions from tantivy_reindex.rs to
  asupersync-based RuntimeFixture for seed-based reproducibility
- Covers full reindex, backfill, integrity check, deterministic range
  reindex, and operator observability tests
- Gated under cfg(all(feature = "asupersync-runtime",
  feature = "recorder-lexical"))

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
